raw_transcript: If the fissure is chronic, we can discuss Botox injections and if the hemorrhoids persist, we can do rubber band ligation right here in the office. But 90% of the time, the fiber and sitz baths do the trick. No more reading on the toilet, okay? Five minutes and done.
final_corrected_note: If the fissure is chronic, we can discuss Botox injections and if the hemorrhoids persist, we can do rubber band ligation right here in the office. But 90% of the time, the fiber and sitz baths do the trick. No more reading on the toilet, okay? Five minutes and done.
